title: Author a data_card function component with conditional slots
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/components/data_card.ex (module MyAppWeb.Components.DataCard). data_card/1 with attrs :title (string, required), :trend (atom, default nil, values [:up, :down, :flat, nil]), :href (string, default nil), slot :icon, slot :actions, slot :inner_block (required). Render
{render_slot(@icon)}

{@title}

{render_slot(@inner_block)}
{render_slot(@actions)}
. Wrap in <.link :if={@href} navigate={@href}> if href is set, otherwise the plain article.
tier_rationale: Multi-slot, multi-attr, conditional rendering based on attrs. Complex composition.
